## Meeting Purpose

[Review content performance and align on future strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/zzMR6y3qBFzhXkegnuHsuATNy5G85G6v?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New Dream Data reports provide deeper analytics on content performance, showing strong early growth in LLM traffic and organic search.](https://fathom.video/share/zzMR6y3qBFzhXkegnuHsuATNy5G85G6v?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)
  - [The high-performing "Voice AI API Evaluation" topic cluster will be expanded with \~20 new comparison articles to double down on bottom-funnel content.](https://fathom.video/share/zzMR6y3qBFzhXkegnuHsuATNy5G85G6v?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
  - [A CMS migration to Sanity caused publishing bugs (broken links, tables, formatting); Jose will fix them, starting with the "Deepgram vs. Google" article.](https://fathom.video/share/zzMR6y3qBFzhXkegnuHsuATNy5G85G6v?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Low-performing, off-topic content will be pruned to focus site authority and improve algorithm signals.](https://fathom.video/share/zzMR6y3qBFzhXkegnuHsuATNy5G85G6v?tab=summary&timestamp=1386.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance & Analytics

  - [New Dream Data reports provide deeper analytics on content performance, focusing on console signups.](https://fathom.video/share/zzMR6y3qBFzhXkegnuHsuATNy5G85G6v?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [**Early Performance (8 weeks):**](https://fathom.video/share/zzMR6y3qBFzhXkegnuHsuATNy5G85G6v?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
      - [**Traffic:** \~14 visits/article (monthly average).](https://fathom.video/share/zzMR6y3qBFzhXkegnuHsuATNy5G85G6v?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
      - [**Organic Search:** Growing from 0 to nearly 100 sessions/week.](https://fathom.video/share/zzMR6y3qBFzhXkegnuHsuATNy5G85G6v?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [**Top-Performing Articles:**](https://fathom.video/share/zzMR6y3qBFzhXkegnuHsuATNy5G85G6v?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - ["Speech-to-text benchmarks"](https://fathom.video/share/zzMR6y3qBFzhXkegnuHsuATNy5G85G6v?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - ["Whisper comparison"](https://fathom.video/share/zzMR6y3qBFzhXkegnuHsuATNy5G85G6v?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [**Strategic Rationale:** The company is prioritizing LLM traffic, which is now back on a growth trend after a flat period.](https://fathom.video/share/zzMR6y3qBFzhXkegnuHsuATNy5G85G6v?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)

### Strategy: Double Down & Prune

  - [**Double Down:** Expand the high-performing "Voice AI API Evaluation" topic cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/zzMR6y3qBFzhXkegnuHsuATNy5G85G6v?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
      - [**Why:** It drives strong traffic and shows early conversion signals.](https://fathom.video/share/zzMR6y3qBFzhXkegnuHsuATNy5G85G6v?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
      - [**Action:** \~20 new comparison topics added to Airtable backlog.](https://fathom.video/share/zzMR6y3qBFzhXkegnuHsuATNy5G85G6v?tab=summary&timestamp=671.0)
  - [**Prune:** Remove low-performing, off-topic content (e.g., "AI consumes water").](https://fathom.video/share/zzMR6y3qBFzhXkegnuHsuATNy5G85G6v?tab=summary&timestamp=1386.0)
      - [**Why:** To focus site authority and improve algorithm signals.](https://fathom.video/share/zzMR6y3qBFzhXkegnuHsuATNy5G85G6v?tab=summary&timestamp=1386.0)
      - [**Action:** Troy approved pruning; Erik will manage.](https://fathom.video/share/zzMR6y3qBFzhXkegnuHsuATNy5G85G6v?tab=summary&timestamp=1386.0)
  - [**Refresh:** Update high-value articles (e.g., "best speech to text APIs") in the new year.](https://fathom.video/share/zzMR6y3qBFzhXkegnuHsuATNy5G85G6v?tab=summary&timestamp=1421.0)
      - [**Why:** To send fresh signals to LLMs and maintain relevance.](https://fathom.video/share/zzMR6y3qBFzhXkegnuHsuATNy5G85G6v?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)

### Production & Quality Control

  - [**Publishing Backlog:** 8 articles are ready for review.](https://fathom.video/share/zzMR6y3qBFzhXkegnuHsuATNy5G85G6v?tab=summary&timestamp=772.0)
  - [**Airtable Status:** Jose needs to update the status of 4-5 published articles.](https://fathom.video/share/zzMR6y3qBFzhXkegnuHsuATNy5G85G6v?tab=summary&timestamp=772.0)
  - [**CMS Migration Issues:** A recent migration from Datto to Sanity caused several bugs.](https://fathom.video/share/zzMR6y3qBFzhXkegnuHsuATNy5G85G6v?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)
      - [**Broken Links:** Appear as plain text in articles (e.g., "Deepgram vs. Google").](https://fathom.video/share/zzMR6y3qBFzhXkegnuHsuATNy5G85G6v?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
      - [**Missing Tables:** Published as screenshots due to CMS limitations.](https://fathom.video/share/zzMR6y3qBFzhXkegnuHsuATNy5G85G6v?tab=summary&timestamp=1108.0)
      - [**Incorrect Formatting:** H2s appear as plain text.](https://fathom.video/share/zzMR6y3qBFzhXkegnuHsuATNy5G85G6v?tab=summary&timestamp=1129.0)
      - [**Missing Content:** The article "Choosing the best speech-to-text on-premise solution" is empty.](https://fathom.video/share/zzMR6y3qBFzhXkegnuHsuATNy5G85G6v?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)

## Next Steps

      - [Restore content to the "Choosing the best speech-to-text on-premise solution" article.](https://fathom.video/share/zzMR6y3qBFzhXkegnuHsuATNy5G85G6v?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)
      - [Update Airtable statuses for published articles.](https://fathom.video/share/zzMR6y3qBFzhXkegnuHsuATNy5G85G6v?tab=summary&timestamp=772.0)
  - [**Hasan:**](https://fathom.video/share/zzMR6y3qBFzhXkegnuHsuATNy5G85G6v?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
      - [Review new comparison topics in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/zzMR6y3qBFzhXkegnuHsuATNy5G85G6v?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
      - [Share a new list of TTS topics in the GrowthX Slack channel.](https://fathom.video/share/zzMR6y3qBFzhXkegnuHsuATNy5G85G6v?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)
  - [**Erik:**](https://fathom.video/share/zzMR6y3qBFzhXkegnuHsuATNy5G85G6v?tab=summary&timestamp=1022.0)
      - [Schedule a call with Hasan, Patricia, and an engineer to resolve language page questions.](https://fathom.video/share/zzMR6y3qBFzhXkegnuHsuATNy5G85G6v?tab=summary&timestamp=1022.0)
  - [**Will:**](https://fathom.video/share/zzMR6y3qBFzhXkegnuHsuATNy5G85G6v?tab=summary&timestamp=1305.0)
      - [Await guidance from Hasan on the content production mix for Dec/Jan.](https://fathom.video/share/zzMR6y3qBFzhXkegnuHsuATNy5G85G6v?tab=summary&timestamp=1305.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/zzMR6y3qBFzhXkegnuHsuATNy5G85G6v?tab=summary&timestamp=1557.0)
      - [Align on the holiday meeting schedule next week.](https://fathom.video/share/zzMR6y3qBFzhXkegnuHsuATNy5G85G6v?tab=summary&timestamp=1557.0)
